item.title: To celebrate our recent 100,000 GitHub star milestone, we're giving out 100 $10-off coupons for Nous...
item.description:
To celebrate our recent 100,000 GitHub star milestone, we're giving out 100 $10-off coupons for Nous Portal subscriptions.
Use code IDKTHECODE to grab yours!
